description_long: This is a rectangular, two-drawer filing cabinet constructed from wood with a natural, slightly weathered finish. The front face features two large drawers, each equipped with a prominent black metal handle and a matching escutcheon plate, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. The sides and back are plain, with visible wood grain and subtle joinery details at the corners, suggesting solid craftsmanship. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing additional items or documents. The handles are robust and likely designed for easy gripping, while the drawers appear deep enough to accommodate standard files or paperwork. The overall look is functional and slightly rustic, making it suitable for both office and garage environments.
description: A sturdy, wooden two-drawer filing cabinet with black metal handles and a weathered finish. Its flat top and robust construction make it both functional and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing plain wood grain and corner joinery details.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two drawers with large black metal handles and escutcheon plates.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, with visible wood texture and joinery.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, featuring a plain wooden panel with subtle grain patterns.
